title: Retro Space Shooter
description: Vertical up-scroll retro shmup vertical slice: hold-to-fire bolts, parallax starfield, a weaving/descending enemy fleet, score + lives HUD, 3 lives with i-frames, GAME OVER and restart.

title: BLOOD // BLOOM // PROTOCOL
description: Story-driven 2D fighter vertical slice: 3 fighters across the Blood/Bloom/Protocol factions, each with a signature mechanic (install, shadow stance-swap, packet zoning). Best-of-3, local 2P + training, neon-noir art.

title: Stack & Bake
description: A cozy one-thumb café game: drag fluffy ingredients onto the plate to match the customer's order, then serve. No timers, no fail state.

title: BREACHPOINT
description: Fast-paced first-person arena shooter: free-for-all deathmatch vs 3 AI bots, 3 hitscan weapons (semi pistol, auto pulse rifle, pump scattergun) with recoil/spread/falloff and headshots, reactive HUD with killfeed and scoreboard, first to 15 frags. Single-player slice of a multiplayer WebGL FPS, netcode-seamed.
